title: Care For Them - Terrafirmacraft
description: Integration of the features of Terrafirmacraft into Care For Them
body:
**CFTFC: Care For Them - TFC Integration**  
Bring the worlds of _Care For Them_ and _TerraFirmaCraft_ together!

CFTFC adds new needs based on TFC's temperature and rainfall systems, encouraging regional exploration. Customize needs with average temperature thresholds or seasonal variations, and watch your Xoonglins adapt to their environment.
